name: Stardust Racers
description: Stardust Racers is a dual-tracked launched roller coaster in Celestial Park at Universal Epic Universe. Manufactured by Mack Rides, it features two racing tracks — Photon and Pulsar — that reach speeds of 62 mph via LSM launch. The ride is the longest coaster ever built by Mack Rides and features a signature Celestial Spin maneuver where both coaster vehicles perform an inverted crisscross.
records: Longest roller coaster built by Mack Rides
Longest roller coaster at Universal Orlando Resort
notes: Missing from category-based discovery because Wikipedia article was created after pipeline last ran. Park infobox confirms 4 coasters at Epic Universe; only 3 were captured.
